view.title: Validate explicit UC need #4
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a dry-run preview and diff is satisfied based on the evidence provided.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a dry-run preview and diff is satisfied based on the evidence provided.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for a dry-run preview and diff, as evidenced by the prior steps that confirm the application of configurations and the generation of diffs. Specifically, the evidence from the steps 'uc-need-validate-1', 'uc-need-validate-2', and 'uc-need-validate-3' all demonstrate that the configurations were applied and the diffs were generated correctly, confirming that the requirement is met. The presence of the 'preview' field in the evidence indicates that the dry-run functionality is operational.
